children.heading: .—Categorical exclusion
children.label: 1 .—Categorical exclusion
children.text: The term “categorical exclusion” has the meaning given the term in section 771.117(c) of title 23, Code of Federal Regulations (or a successor regulation).

children.heading: .—Documented categorical exclusion
children.label: 2 .—Documented categorical exclusion
children.text: The term “documented categorical exclusion” has the meaning given the term in section 771.117(d) of title 23, Code of Federal Regulations (or a successor regulation).

children.heading: .—Environmental assessment
children.label: 3 .—Environmental assessment
children.text: The term “environmental assessment” has the meaning given the term in section 1508.1 of title 40, Code of Federal Regulations (or a successor regulation).

children.heading: .—Environmental impact statement
children.label: 4 .—Environmental impact statement
children.text: The term “environmental impact statement” means a detailed statement required under section 102(2)(C) of the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ().42 U.S.C. 4332(2)(C)

children.heading: .—Federal agency
children.label: 5 .—Federal agency
children.text: The term “Federal agency” includes a State that has assumed responsibility under section 327.

children.heading: .—NEPA process
children.label: 6 .—NEPA process
children.text: The term “NEPA process” means the entirety of the development and documentation of the analysis required under the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ( et seq.), including the assessment and analysis of any impacts, alternatives, and mitigation of a proposed action, and any interagency participation and public involvement required to be carried out before the Secretary undertakes a proposed action.42 U.S.C. 4321

children.heading: .—Proposed action
children.label: 7 .—Proposed action
children.text: The term “proposed action” means an action (within the meaning of the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ( et seq.)) under this title that the Secretary proposes to carry out.42 U.S.C. 4321

children.heading: .—Reporting period
children.label: 8 .—Reporting period
children.text: The term “reporting period” means the fiscal year prior to the fiscal year in which a report is issued under subsection (b).

children.heading: .—Secretary
children.label: 9 .—Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” includes the governor or head of an applicable State agency of a State that has assumed responsibility under section 327.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: The Secretary shall carry out a process to track, and annually submit to the Committee on Environment and Public Works of the Senate and the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure of the House of Representatives a report containing, the information described in paragraph (3).

children.label: i
children.text: begins on the date on which the Notice of Intent is published in the Federal Register; and

children.label: ii
children.text: ends on the date on which the Secretary issues a record of decision, including, if necessary, a revised record of decision; and

children.label: i
children.text: begins on the date on which the Secretary makes a determination to prepare an environmental assessment; and

children.label: ii
children.text: ends on the date on which the Secretary issues a finding of no significant impact or determines that preparation of an environmental impact statement is necessary.

children.label: A
children.text: the number of proposed actions for which a categorical exclusion was issued during the reporting period;

children.label: B
children.text: the number of proposed actions for which a documented categorical exclusion was issued by the Department of Transportation during the reporting period;

children.label: C
children.text: the number of proposed actions pending on the date on which the report is submitted for which the issuance of a documented categorical exclusion by the Department of Transportation is pending;

children.label: D
children.text: the number of proposed actions for which an environmental assessment was issued by the Department of Transportation during the reporting period;

children.label: E
children.text: the length of time the Department of Transportation took to complete each environmental assessment described in subparagraph (D);

children.label: F
children.text: the number of proposed actions pending on the date on which the report is submitted for which an environmental assessment is being drafted by the Department of Transportation;

children.label: G
children.text: the number of proposed actions for which an environmental impact statement was completed by the Department of Transportation during the reporting period;

children.label: H
children.text: the length of time that the Department of Transportation took to complete each environmental impact statement described in subparagraph (G);

children.label: I
children.text: the number of proposed actions pending on the date on which the report is submitted for which an environmental impact statement is being drafted; and

children.label: i
children.text: funding has been identified; and

children.label: ii
children.text: all other Federal, State, and local activities that are required to allow the proposed action to proceed are completed.
